fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: glamsterdam-devnet-7 launched Tuesday with Gloas fork; ~80-90% participation rate; Grandine + Erigon onboarding in progress
Benchmarks still targeting devnet-6 results; devnet-7 benchmarks not yet ready
DevNet 8 planned before testnet graduation; final repricing numbers and minor EIP cleanup still outstanding
devnet-7 designated as short-lived public testing ground for app developers ahead of Sepolia/Hoodi; faucet available

eip_proposals_hegota.highlight: Hegota non-headliner submission deadline: August 6; PR EIPs against Meta EIP-8081; present on the following ACDE
FOCIL is the confirmed Hegota headliner; native account abstraction CFI'd as non-headliner pending convergence among implementers
EIP-8268 (storage routes in block access lists) PFI'd by Carlos (absent); presentation deferred to next ACDE

organizational.highlight: Ethereum mascot runoff vote (flamingo vs. polar bear) underway on ETH Magicians; community urged to vote
Seven Glamsterdam EIPs still pending promotion to Review status; authors asked to approve open PRs
Glamsterdam EIPs not yet moved to SFI; Pooja to confirm four testing milestones met with testing team before promoting

rest_ssz.highlight: Marius (absent) flagged missing non-engine methods on engine port; Prysm confirmed only 4 methods still used: eth_getBlockByNumber, eth_getBlockByHash, eth_chainId, eth_blockNumber (unused); eth1 deposit path methods (eth_call, eth_getLogs) are dead code post-Pectra, planned for removal

action_items.action: Review non-engine methods exposed on engine port; confirm which are needed and whether eth1 deposit path can be retired
Confirm four SFI milestone criteria met with testing team before promoting Glamsterdam EIPs to SFI

decisions.decision: glamsterdam-devnet-7 designated as the short-lived public app-developer testnet; no separate Mekong-style network planned
EIP-8268 (storage routes in block access lists) PFI'd for Hegota

targets.target: Hegota non-headliner EIP submission deadline — August 6, 2026
